original_question:
Let the sum of the first n terms of a positive sequence $\{a_n\}$ be $S_n$, and it satisfies $4S_n=a_n^2+2a_n-3$ ($n\in\mathbb{N}^*$). Determine the value of $a_{2016}$.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
